title: Bet log entry
description: One record per bet placed. The source of truth for tournament P/L.

selection.description: e.g. HOME, DRAW, AWAY, OVER_2_5, YES, AHC_-1.5_HOME, 2-1

model_edge_pct.description: Model probability minus implied bookmaker probability, expressed as decimal (0.05 = 5%)

rationale.description: Free-text reasoning. Required if model_edge_pct is null (i.e. a manual pick)

pnl.description: Settled P/L. (odds-1)*stake on WIN, -stake on LOSS, 0 on PUSH/VOID.

closing_odds_decimal.description: Consensus de-vig INPUT: the raw decimal price for this selection in the CLOSING market (last odds snapshot before kickoff). Populated by model/clv.py.

closing_fair_prob.description: Vig-free closing probability of this selection, from de-vigging the closing market the same way predict.py does. CLV is measured against this.

clv_pct.description: Closing-line value: (odds_decimal / closing_fair_odds - 1) * 100. Positive means you beat the de-vigged close. The honest skill metric on a small sample.

best_book.description: Optional: the sportsbook offering the best (highest) closing price for this selection, for line-shopping context.
